parameters.text:
Analyze this invoice document and extract the following information. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown formatting or code blocks.

Extract these fields:
- invoice_number: The invoice number/reference
- invoice_date: Date issued (YYYY-MM-DD)
- due_date: Payment due date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- vendor_name: Name of the business/person who ISSUED the invoice
- subtotal: Amount before tax (number only, no currency symbols)
- tax_rate: Tax percentage (just the number, e.g. 15 for 15%)
- tax_amount: Tax amount (number only)
- total: Total including tax (number only)
- currency: Currency code (e.g. ZAR)
- line_items: Array of {description, quantity, unit_price, amount}
- confidence: 0-100
- notes: any extraction quality notes

If a field is not found, use null. For amounts use numbers only.
